# PROMPTS_LEDGER

Purpose: Track every prompt executed by Codex or AI tools.

Policy:
- Append-only entries.
- One prompt execution = one new ledger row.

| Date | Prompt ID | Prompt Purpose | Prompt Content | Execution Outcome | Related Files |

| 2026-03-05 | PROMPT-2026-03-05-GOV-LEDGER-SETUP-001 | Create and initialize project governance ledger system for FINOS. | "Implement a PROJECT GOVERNANCE LEDGER SYSTEM... create docs/ledgers/*, define structures, seed folder tree/dependencies/schema/TODO, and record setup execution." | Completed: 8 ledgers created, baselines initialized, governance update policy embedded. | docs/ledgers/IMPLEMENTATION_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/DECISIONS_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/TODO_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/KEY_CONSIDERATIONS_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/PROMPTS_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/SCHEMA_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/DEPENDENCIES_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/FOLDERTREE_LEDGER.md |
| 2026-03-05 | PROMPT-2026-03-05-TEMPLATE-UPGRADE-001 | Upgrade FINOS execution prompt template to v1.1 with governance controls. | "Update FINOS_EXEC_PROMPT_TEMPLATE across repository: add section 7A idempotency, section 9A event contract, strengthen architecture determinism rules, and add CI gates in Definition of Done." | Completed: canonical template updated in implementation plan; template references added in telemetry/HR-sales/blueprint docs; validation completed. | docs/platform/02_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md; docs/platform/08_TELEMETRY_SCALABILITY_METRICS.md; docs/platform/09_HR_SALES_ENTERPRISE_OS.md; docs/platform/01_MASTER_BLUEPRINT.md; docs/ledgers/PROMPTS_LEDGER.md |
| 2026-03-05 | PROMPT-2026-03-05-PROMPT-ENGINE-001 | Implement FINOS Prompt Execution Engine with transactional control, guardrails, rework loop, and CLI. | Build backend/financeops/prompt_engine with loader, dependency graph, execution transaction, guardrails, pytest validation, ledger updates, and rework attempts (max 3). | Completed: engine + tests scaffold implemented; compile checks passed; runtime pytest execution blocked due missing test dependencies in environment. | backend/financeops/prompt_engine/*; backend/tests/prompt_engine/*; backend/pyproject.toml; docs/ledgers/IMPLEMENTATION_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/PROMPTS_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/DECISIONS_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/KEY_CONSIDERATIONS_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/TODO_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/FOLDERTREE_LEDGER.md |
| 2026-03-05 | PROMPT-2026-03-05-PROMPT-ENGINE-001 | Harden prompt-engine guardrails after test failure detection. | 'Fix repository protection edge case for dotfiles and revalidate prompt_engine tests.' | Completed: repository protection bug fixed, prompt_engine tests green, full suite still blocked by missing sqlalchemy dependency. | backend/financeops/prompt_engine/guardrails/security_policy.py; backend/tests/prompt_engine/*; docs/ledgers/IMPLEMENTATION_LEDGER.md; docs/ledgers/PROMPTS_LEDGER.md |
| 2026-03-05 | PROMPT-ENGINE-HARDENING-001 | Prompt Execution Engine hardening and operational improvements. | 'Create prompt catalog, add finos-engine run --dry-run, enforce operator stop-control behavior, verify sqlalchemy dependency presence, update tests, and validate.' | Completed: dry-run implemented, structured catalog parsing enabled, stop-control message updated, prompt-engine tests green (17 passed). | docs/prompts/PROMPTS_CATALOG.md; backend/financeops/prompt_engine/cli.py; backend/financeops/prompt_engine/prompt_loader.py; backend/financeops/prompt_engine/executor.py; backend/tests/prompt_engine/test_prompt_loader.py; backend/tests/prompt_engine/test_execution_pipeline.py |

ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance.              This method is a coroutine which will try to establish the connection         in the background.  When successful, the coroutine returns a         (transport, protocol) pair. meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs closed=False debug=False> protocol_factory = <function _create_ssl_connection.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x0000022583F4B740> host = 'localhost', port = 5433      async def create_connection(             self, protocol_factory, host=None, port=None,             *, ssl=None, family=0,             proto=0, flags=0, sock=None,             local_addr=None, server_hostname=None,             ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance.              This method is a coroutine which will try to establish the connection         in the background.  When successful, the coroutine returns a         (transport, protocol) pair.         """         if server_hostname is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError('server_hostname is only meaningful with ssl')              if server_hostname is None and ssl:             # Use host as default for server_hostname. To avoid this error, you can pass             # server_hostname='' -- this will bypass the hostname             # check.  (This also means that if host is a numeric             # IP/IPv6 address, we will attempt to verify that exact             # address; this will probably fail, but it is possible to             # create a certificate for a specific IP address, so we             # don't judge it here.)             if not host:                 raise ValueError('You must set server_hostname '                                  'when using ssl without a host')             server_hostname = host              if ssl_handshake_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_handshake_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if ssl_shutdown_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_shutdown_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs                 for addrinfo in infos:                     try:                         sock = await self._connect_sock(                             exceptions, addrinfo, laddr_infos)                         break                     except OSError:                         continue             else:  # using happy eyeballs                 sock, _, _ = await staggered.staggered_race( loop=self)                  if sock is None:                 exceptions = [exc for sub in exceptions for exc in sub]                 try:                     if len(exceptions) == 1:                         raise exceptions[0]                     else:                         # If they all have the same str(), raise one.                         model = str(exceptions[0])                         if all(str(exc) == model for exc in exceptions):                             raise exceptions[0]                         # Raise a combined exception so the user can see all                         # the ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance. 'ssl_handshake_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if ssl_shutdown_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_shutdown_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None: ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance. 'ssl_handshake_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if ssl_shutdown_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_shutdown_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance.              This method is a coroutine which will try to establish the connection         in the background.  When successful, the coroutine returns a         (transport, protocol) pair.         """         if server_hostname is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError('server_hostname is only meaningful with ssl')              if server_hostname is None and ssl:             # Use host as default for server_hostname. (This also means that if host is a numeric             # IP/IPv6 address, we will attempt to verify that exact             # address; this will probably fail, but it is possible to             # create a certificate for a specific IP address, so we             # don't judge it here.)             if not host:                 raise ValueError('You must set server_hostname ' 'ssl_handshake_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if ssl_shutdown_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_shutdown_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs                 for addrinfo in infos:                     try:                         sock = await self._connect_sock(                             exceptions, addrinfo, laddr_infos)                         break                     except OSError:                         continue             else:  # using happy eyeballs                 sock, _, _ = await staggered.staggered_race( all(str(exc) == model for exc in exceptions):                             raise exceptions[0]                         # Raise a combined exception so the user can see all                         # the type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None: type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None: ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance.              This method is a coroutine which will try to establish the connection         in the background.  When successful, the coroutine returns a         (transport, protocol) pair. meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None: loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance. 'ssl_handshake_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if ssl_shutdown_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_shutdown_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs                 for addrinfo in infos:                     try:                         sock = await self._connect_sock(                             exceptions, addrinfo, laddr_infos)                         break                     except OSError:                         continue             else:  # using happy eyeballs                 sock, _, _ = await staggered.staggered_race( all(str(exc) == model for exc in exceptions):                             raise exceptions[0]                         # Raise a combined exception so the user can see all                         # the type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None: ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance. meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None: closed=False debug=False> protocol_factory = <function _create_ssl_connection.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x0000022583F4B740> host = 'localhost', port = 5433      async def create_connection(             self, protocol_factory, host=None, port=None,             *, ssl=None, family=0,             proto=0, flags=0, sock=None,             local_addr=None, server_hostname=None,             ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance.              This method is a coroutine which will try to establish the connection         in the background.  When successful, the coroutine returns a         (transport, protocol) pair.         """         if server_hostname is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError('server_hostname is only meaningful with ssl')              if server_hostname is None and ssl:             # Use host as default for server_hostname.  It is an error             # if host is empty or not set, e.g. when an             # already-connected socket was passed or when only a port             # is given.  To avoid this error, you can pass             # server_hostname='' -- this will bypass the hostname             # check.  (This also means that if host is a numeric             # IP/IPv6 address, we will attempt to verify that exact             # address; this will probably fail, but it is possible to             # create a certificate for a specific IP address, so we             # don't judge it here.)             if not host:                 raise ValueError('You must set server_hostname '                                  'when using ssl without a host')             server_hostname = host              if ssl_handshake_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_handshake_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if ssl_shutdown_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_shutdown_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs                 for addrinfo in infos:                     try:                         sock = await self._connect_sock(                             exceptions, addrinfo, laddr_infos)                         break                     except OSError:                         continue             else:  # using happy eyeballs                 sock, _, _ = await staggered.staggered_race(                     (functools.partial(self._connect_sock,                                        exceptions, addrinfo, laddr_infos)                      for addrinfo in infos),                     happy_eyeballs_delay, loop=self)                  if sock is None:                 exceptions = [exc for sub in exceptions for exc in sub]                 try:                     if len(exceptions) == 1:                         raise exceptions[0]                     else:                         # If they all have the same str(), raise one.                         model = str(exceptions[0])                         if all(str(exc) == model for exc in exceptions):                             raise exceptions[0]                         # Raise a combined exception so the user can see all                         # the closed=False debug=False> protocol_factory = <function _create_ssl_connection.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x0000022583F4B740> host = 'localhost', port = 5433      async def create_connection(             self, protocol_factory, host=None, port=None,             *, ssl=None, family=0,             proto=0, flags=0, sock=None,             local_addr=None, server_hostname=None,             ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance.              This method is a coroutine which will try to establish the connection         in the background.  When successful, the coroutine returns a         (transport, protocol) pair.         """         if server_hostname is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError('server_hostname is only meaningful with ssl')              if server_hostname is None and ssl:             # Use host as default for server_hostname.  It is an error             # if host is empty or not set, e.g. when an             # already-connected socket was passed or when only a port             # is given.  To avoid this error, you can pass             # server_hostname='' -- this will bypass the hostname             # check.  (This also means that if host is a numeric             # IP/IPv6 address, we will attempt to verify that exact             # address; this will probably fail, but it is possible to             # create a certificate for a specific IP address, so we             # don't judge it here.)             if not host:                 raise ValueError('You must set server_hostname '                                  'when using ssl without a host')             server_hostname = host              if ssl_handshake_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_handshake_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if ssl_shutdown_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_shutdown_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs                 for addrinfo in infos:                     try:                         sock = await self._connect_sock(                             exceptions, addrinfo, laddr_infos)                         break                     except OSError:                         continue             else:  # using happy eyeballs                 sock, _, _ = await staggered.staggered_race(                     (functools.partial(self._connect_sock,                                        exceptions, addrinfo, laddr_infos)                      for addrinfo in infos),                     happy_eyeballs_delay, loop=self)                  if sock is None:                 exceptions = [exc for sub in exceptions for exc in sub]                 try:                     if len(exceptions) == 1:                         raise exceptions[0]                     else:                         # If they all have the same str(), raise one.                         model = str(exceptions[0])                         if all(str(exc) == model for exc in exceptions):                             raise exceptions[0]                         # Raise a combined exception so the user can see all                         # the ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance.              This method is a coroutine which will try to establish the connection         in the background.  When successful, the coroutine returns a         (transport, protocol) pair.         """         if server_hostname is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError('server_hostname is only meaningful with ssl')              if server_hostname is None and ssl:             # Use host as default for server_hostname.  It is an error             # if host is empty or not set, e.g. when an             # already-connected socket was passed or when only a port             # is given.  To avoid this error, you can pass             # server_hostname='' -- this will bypass the hostname             # check.  (This also means that if host is a numeric             # IP/IPv6 address, we will attempt to verify that exact             # address; this will probably fail, but it is possible to             # create a certificate for a specific IP address, so we             # don't judge it here.)             if not host:                 raise ValueError('You must set server_hostname '                                  'when using ssl without a host')             server_hostname = host              if ssl_handshake_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_handshake_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if ssl_shutdown_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_shutdown_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs                 for addrinfo in infos:                     try:                         sock = await self._connect_sock(                             exceptions, addrinfo, laddr_infos)                         break                     except OSError:                         continue             else:  # using happy eyeballs                 sock, _, _ = await staggered.staggered_race( ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance. meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if interleave:                 infos = _interleave_addrinfos(infos, interleave)                  exceptions = []             if happy_eyeballs_delay is None:                 # not using happy eyeballs ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance. meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:                 laddr_infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                     local_addr, family=family,                     type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto,                     flags=flags, loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance.              This method is a coroutine which will try to establish the connection         in the background.  When successful, the coroutine returns a         (transport, protocol) pair.         """         if server_hostname is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError('server_hostname is only meaningful with ssl')              if server_hostname is None and ssl:             # Use host as default for server_hostname.  It is an error             # if host is empty or not set, e.g. when an             # already-connected socket was passed or when only a port             # is given.  To avoid this error, you can pass             # server_hostname='' -- this will bypass the hostname             # check.  (This also means that if host is a numeric             # IP/IPv6 address, we will attempt to verify that exact             # address; this will probably fail, but it is possible to             # 'ssl_handshake_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if ssl_shutdown_timeout is not None and not ssl:             raise ValueError(                 'ssl_shutdown_timeout is only meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None: loop=self)                 if not laddr_infos:                     raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')             else:                 laddr_infos = None                  if ssl_handshake_timeout=None,             ssl_shutdown_timeout=None,             happy_eyeballs_delay=None, interleave=None):         """Connect to a TCP server.              Create a streaming transport connection to a given internet host and         port: socket family AF_INET or socket.AF_INET6 depending on host (or         family if specified), socket type SOCK_STREAM. protocol_factory must be         a callable returning a protocol instance. meaningful with ssl')              if sock is not None:             _check_ssl_socket(sock)              if happy_eyeballs_delay is not None and interleave is None:             # If using happy eyeballs, default to interleave addresses by family             interleave = 1              if host is not None or port is not None:             if sock is not None:                 raise ValueError(                     'host/port and sock can not be specified at the same time')                  infos = await self._ensure_resolved(                 (host, port), family=family,                 type=socket.SOCK_STREAM, proto=proto, flags=flags, loop=self)             if not infos:                 raise OSError('getaddrinfo() returned empty list')                  if local_addr is not None:
